full_text:
Pang Xi 龐羲
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Xi (龐羲)was born in Henan. A friend of Liu Yan. Collected his grandchildren and brought them to Shu. Pang Xi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Yan, Liu Zhang, and the Shu Kingdom.
